validation_runs.notes: Includes new adversarial matrix, home impact assertions, replay determinism, and existing home loop regression coverage.

validation_runs.command: python -m pytest tests/test_hard_freeze_regression.py tests/test_layer_redundancy_guard.py tests/test_ui_canonical_wiring_guard.py tests/test_sprint0_sprint1_minimal_execution.py tests/test_task_creation_command_runtime.py tests/replay/test_event_replay_engine.py -q

residual_risks: Architecture contract startup warning is pre-existing and non-blocking for these tests.
Natural-language interpretation remains deterministic but still rule-based; future semantic upgrades can improve recall for unusual phrasing.
